VibesServicesContact

404

This page doesn't exist.

A dead end's got your whole attention -- which is exactly why it shouldn't waste it. Most sites just drop you here with a shrug and a broken layout. A 404's a small design decision like any other though, so we treated it like one: no shrug, just the two doors most likely to be the one you actually wanted.

← Back homeBrowse the vibes
❯ The 404 pageSituational

Never seen on purpose, so it's easy to neglect -- but the moment someone actually lands here, a good one turns a mistake into a soft landing, and a bad one just loses a visitor. Worth ten minutes; not worth an illustration budget.

How it's done

Astro serves this src/pages/404.astro for any unmatched route. It reuses the same header, footer, and verdict system as every other page -- because consistency is basically the whole point of a design system.

[ARTIFICE UI]

Websites with a voice, not a template.

The vibesServicesContact

Artifice -- clever, cunning trickery. We took the name so we'd be the one to point it out first.
